sentences.arabic: رَأَتْ هِنْدٌ جَارَتَهَا حَزِينَةً فَذَهَبَتْ إِلَيْهَا.
sentences.translation: Hind je vidjela komšijicu tužnu i otišla joj.
sentences.translationEn: Hind saw her neighbor sad and went to her.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَتْهَا: هَلْ أَنْتِ بِخَيْرٍ؟ هَلْ أَقْدِرُ عَلَى مُسَاعَدَتِكِ؟
sentences.translation: Pitala ju je: Jesi li dobro? Mogu li ti pomoći?
sentences.translationEn: She asked her: Are you okay? Can I help you?

sentences.translation: Komšijica joj je ispričala problem i zaplakala.
sentences.translationEn: The neighbor told her her problem and cried.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتْ هِنْدٌ مَعَهَا وَسَمِعَتْهَا بِصَبْرٍ وَحَنَانٍ.
sentences.translation: Hind je sjela s njom i strpljivo i nježno je slušala.
sentences.translationEn: Hind sat with her and listened patiently and tenderly.
